title: Type of claim
h1: What type of claim is the claimant making?
hint:
You can choose all that apply to the claimant. Further information will be asked for later in the claim.

Select all that apply

discrimination.hint: for example, because of the claimant's sex, ethnicity, disability or other characteristic

whistleBlowing.hint: including dismissal or any other unfair treatment after whistleblowing

otherTypesOfClaims.explain: Tell us briefly what type of claim the claimant is making. You can describe the details of the claim later.

typeOfClaim.required: Please select at least one of the options below to choose the type of claim.

otherClaim.required: Tell us briefly what type of claim the claimant is making
